Common low-bush blueberry (Vaccinium angustifolium) growing wild here in the "fairy ring" clear patch on this trail. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Lord Woods, 94B Lawrence Rd, Boxford, MA 01921, USA

Wild(?) grape vines right next to the wooden footbridge between the two wetland areas. Geotag may not be exact but it's on this trail somewhere Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.

Black and red raspberry (Rubus spp.) growing wild or naturalized here along a trail loop, in the sunnier patch past the trees. Few fruit and somewhat difficult to access but they're here Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.
